steps.title: Identify the list signal
steps.content: The sentence says “three types of muscle” and follows directly with “cardiac, and skeletal”—items being enumerated. The blank must introduce this enumeration.

steps.title: Apply the colon rule
steps.content:
A colon introduces a list after an independent clause. Choice B uses a colon after “muscle tissue,” correctly introducing smooth, cardiac, and skeletal as the three types.
  • A creates awkward phrasing
  • C omits necessary punctuation
  • D uses a period that inappropriately breaks the enumeration into separate sentences
.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
